input validation\n    \"\"\"\n    # Input validation guards\n    if not isinstance(undiscounted_option_price, (int, float)):\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid option price type: {type(undiscounted_option_price)}\")\n        return None\n        \n    if t <= 0:\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid time parameter: t={t}, skipping calculation\")\n        return None\n        \n    if F <= 0 or K <= 0:\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid price parameters: F={F}, K={K}, skipping calculation\")\n        return None\n    \n    if undiscounted_option_price <= 0:\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid undiscounted price: {undiscounted_option_price}\")\n        return None\n    \n    try:\n        return vectorized_implied_volatility(\n            undiscounted_option_price, F, K, t, flag\n        )\n    except ZeroDivisionError as e:\n        logger.error(f\"Calculation failed: price={undiscounted_option_price}, F={F}, K={K}, t={t}, flag={flag}\")\n        return None\n    except Exception as e:\n        logger.error(f\"Unexpected calculation error: {e}\")\n        return None\n```\n\n#### 2. **Improve Cloudflare API Error Handling**\n\n**Priority:** HIGH  \n**Impact:** Eliminates 50 API 404 errors\n\n```python\ndef safe_deployment_verification(deployment_id, max_retries=3):\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify Cloudflare deployment with proper error handling\n    \"\"\"\n    for attempt in range(max_retries):\n        try:\n            deployment = check_deployment_exists(deployment_id)\n            if not deployment:\n                logger.warning(f\"Deployment {deployment_id} not found, skipping verification\")\n                return False\n            return True\n            \n        except HTTPError as e:\n            if e.response.status_code == 404:\n                logger.warning(f\"Attempt {attempt + 1}: Deployment {deployment_id} not found\")\n                if attempt < max_retries - 1:\n                    time.sleep(2 ** attempt)  # Exponential backoff\n                    continue\n                else:\n                    logger.error(f\"Deployment {deployment_id} not found after {max_retries} attempts\")\n                    return False\n            else:\n                raise\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Unexpected error checking deployment: {e}\")\n            raise\n```\n\n#### 3. **Clean Up Failed Pods**\n\n**Priority:** HIGH  \n**Impact:** Improved operational hygiene\n\n```bash\n# Options pipeline cleanup\nkubectl Fix ZeroDivisionError in Options Pipeline\n309\t\n310\t**Priority:** CRITICAL - Active production issue  \n311\t**Impact:** Eliminates 127+ calculation failures, prevents 247+ restarts\n312\t\n313\t**Recommended Code Solution:**\n314\t```python\n315\tdef safe_implied_volatility_calculation(undiscounted_option_price, F, K, t, flag):\n316\t    \"\"\"\n317\t    Safe wrapper for implied volatility calculation with input validation\n318\t    \"\"\"\n319\t    # Input validation guards\n320\t    if not isinstance(undiscounted_option_price, (int, float)):\n321\t        logger.warning(f\"Invalid option price type: {type(undiscounted_option_price)}\")\n322\t        return None\n323\t        \n324\t    if t <= 0:\n325\t        logger.warning(f\"Invalid time parameter: t={t}, skipping calculation\")\n326\t        return None\n327\t        \n328\t    if F <= 0 or K <= 0:\n329\t        logger.warning(f\"Invalid price parameters: F={F}, K={K}, skipping calculation\")\n330\t        return None\n331\t    \n332\t    if undiscounted_option_price <= 0:\n333\t        logger.warning(f\"Invalid undiscounted price: {undiscounted_option_price}\")\n334\t        return None\n335\t    \n336\t    try:\n337\t        return vectorized_implied_volatility(\n338\t            undiscounted_option_price, F, K, t, flag\n339\t        )\n340\t    except ZeroDivisionError as e:\n341\t        logger.error(f\"Calculation failed: price={undiscounted_option_price}, F={F}, K={K}, t={t}\")\n342\t        return None\n343\t    except Exception as e:\n344\t        logger.error(f\"Unexpected calculation error: {e}\")\n345\t        return None\n346\t```\n347\t\n348\t**Deployment Steps:**\n349\t1. Update calculation code in options pipeline\n350\t2. Add comprehensive input validation\n351\t3. Implement graceful error handling\n352\t4. Add monitoring for validation failures\n353\t5. Deploy to canary environment first\n354\t6. Monitor for ZeroDivisionError elimination\n355\t\n356\t#### 2. Clean Up Failed Pods\n357\t\n358\t**Priority:** HIGH - Operational hygiene\n359\t\n360\t```bash\n361\t# Options pipeline cleanup\n362\tkubectl --server=http://traefik-iad-options:8001 delete pod options-greeks-7cbcd5dff4-8db6c -n options --force --grace-period=0\n363\t\n364\t# IBKR MCP cleanup\n365\tkubectl --server=http://traefik-ardenone-cluster:8001 delete pod ibkr-mcp-server-7d78d47dbb-898mv -n ibkr-mcp --force --grace-period=0\n366\tkubectl --server=http://traefik-ardenone-cluster:8001 delete pod ibkr-mcp-server-7dd7c9c9bc-6cn57 -n ibkr-mcp --force --grace-period=0\n367\t```\n368\t\n369\t### Medium-Term Actions 🟡\n370\t\n371\t#### 3. Implement Data Quality Validation Layer\n372\t\n373\t**Priority:** HIGH - Prevents invalid data from reaching calculations\n374\t\n375\t**Recommended Architecture:**\n376\t```python\n377\tclass OptionsDataValidator:\n378\t    \"\"\"Validate options data before expensive calculations\"\"\"\n379\t    \n380\t    def __init__(self):\n381\t        self.logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n382\t    \n383\t    def validate_row(self, row):\n384\t        \"\"\"Validate a single options data row\"\"\"\n385\t        checks = [\n386\t            (row['T'] > 0, f\"Invalid T={row['T']}\"),\n387\t            (row['F'] > 0, f\"Invalid F={row['F']}\"),\n388\t            (row['K'] > 0, f\"Invalid K={row['K']}\"),\n389\t            (row['undiscounted_option_price'] > 0, f\"Invalid price={row['undiscounted_option_price']}\")\n390\t        ]\n391\t        \n392\t        for valid, error_msg in checks:\n393\t            if not valid:\n394\t                self.logger.warning(f\"Data validation failed: {error_msg} for symbol {row.get('symbol')}\")\n395\t                return False\n396\t        return True\n397\t    \n398\t    def filter_chunk(self, chunk):\n399\t        \"\"\"Filter out invalid rows from a chunk\"\"\"\n400\t        valid_rows = []\n401\t        for idx, row in chunk.iterrows():\n402\t            if self.validate_row(row):\n403\t                valid_rows.append(row)\n404\t        return valid_rows\n405\t```\n406\t\n407\t#### 4. Add Telemetry for Data Quality\n408\t\n409\t**Prometheus Metrics:**\n410\t```python\n411\tfrom prometheus_client import Counter, Histogram\n412\t\n413\tvalidation_metrics = {\n414\t    'options_validation_failures_total': Counter(\n415\t        'options_validation_failures_total',\n416\t        'Total count of validation failures',\n417\t        ['reason']  # t_zero, f_invalid, k_invalid, price_invalid\n418\t    ),\n419\t    'options_calculation_success_total': Counter(\n420\t        'options_calculation_success_total',\n421\t        'Successful options calculations'\n422\t    ),\n423\t    'options_calculation_duration_seconds': Histogram(\n424\t        'options_calculation_duration_seconds',\n425\t        'Options calculation duration'\n426\t    )\n427\t}\n428\t```\n429\t\n430\t### Long-Term Improvements 🟢\n431\t\n432\t#### 5. threshold\"\"\"\n438\t    \n439\t    def __init__(self, failure_threshold=10, timeout=300):\n440\t        self.failure_threshold = failure_threshold\n441\t        self.timeout = timeout\n442\t Fix ZeroDivisionError in Options Pipeline\n\n**Priority:** CRITICAL - Active production issue  \n**Impact:** Eliminates 127+ calculation failures, prevents 247+ restarts\n\n**Recommended Code Solution:**\n```python\ndef safe_implied_volatility_calculation(undiscounted_option_price, F, K, t, flag):\n    \"\"\"\n    Safe wrapper for implied volatility calculation with input validation\n    \"\"\"\n    # Input validation guards\n    if not isinstance(undiscounted_option_price, (int, float)):\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid option price type: {type(undiscounted_option_price)}\")\n        return None\n        \n    if t <= 0:\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid time parameter: t={t}, skipping calculation\")\n        return None\n        \n    if F <= 0 or K <= 0:\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid price parameters: F={F}, K={K}, skipping calculation\")\n        return None\n    \n    if undiscounted_option_price <= 0:\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid undiscounted price: {undiscounted_option_price}\")\n        return None\n    \n    try:\n        return vectorized_implied_volatility(\n            undiscounted_option_price, F, K, t, flag\n        )\n    except ZeroDivisionError as e:\n        logger.error(f\"Calculation failed: price={undiscounted_option_price}, F={F}, K={K}, t={t}\")\n        return None\n    except Exception as e:\n        logger.error(f\"Unexpected calculation error: {e}\")\n        return None\n```\n\n**Deployment Steps:**\n1. Update calculation code in options pipeline\n2. Add comprehensive input validation\n3. Implement graceful error handling\n4. Add monitoring for validation failures\n5. Deploy to canary environment first\n6. Monitor for ZeroDivisionError elimination\n\n#### 2. Implement Data Quality Validation Layer\n\n**Priority:** HIGH - Prevents invalid data from reaching calculations\n\n**Recommended Architecture:**\n```python\nclass OptionsDataValidator:\n    \"\"\"Validate options data before expensive calculations\"\"\"\n    \n    def __init__(self):\n        self.logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n    \n    def validate_row(self, row):\n        \"\"\"Validate a single options data row\"\"\"\n        checks = [\n            (row['T'] > 0, f\"Invalid T={row['T']}\"),\n            (row['F'] > 0, f\"Invalid F={row['F']}\"),\n            (row['K'] > 0, f\"Invalid K={row['K']}\"),\n            (row['undiscounted_option_price'] > 0, f\"Invalid price={row['undiscounted_option_price']}\")\n        ]\n        \n        for valid, error_msg in checks:\n            if not valid:\n                self.logger.warning(f\"Data validation failed: {error_msg} for symbol {row.get('symbol')}\")\n                return False\n        return True\n    \n    def filter_chunk(self, chunk):\n        \"\"\"Filter out invalid rows from a chunk\"\"\"\n        valid_rows = []\n        for idx, row in chunk.iterrows():\n            if self.validate_row(row):\n                valid_rows.append(row)\n        return valid_rows\n```\n\n#### 4. Add Telemetry for Data Quality\n\n**Prometheus Metrics:**\n```python\nfrom prometheus_client import Counter, Histogram\n\nvalidation_metrics = {\n    'options_validation_failures_total': Counter(\n        'options_validation_failures_total',\n        'Total count of validation failures',\n        ['reason']  # t_zero, f_invalid, k_invalid, price_invalid\n    ),\n    'options_calculation_success_total': Counter(\n        'options_calculation_success_total',\n        'Successful options calculations'\n    ),\n    'options_calculation_duration_seconds': Histogram(\n        'options_calculation_duration_seconds',\n        'Options calculation duration'\n    )\n}\n```\n\n### Long-Term Improvements 🟢\n\n#### 5. Implement Circuit Breaker Pattern\n\n**Architecture:**\n```python\nclass OptionsCalculationCircuitBreaker:\n    \"\"\"Prevent cascade failures by stopping calculations after threshold\"\"\"\n    \n    def __init__(self, failure_threshold=10, timeout=300):\n        self.failure_threshold = failure_threshold\n        self.timeout = timeout\n        self.failures = 0\n        self.last_failure_time = None\n        self.state = 'CLOSED'  # CLOSED, OPEN, HALF_OPEN\n    \n    def call(self, func, *args, **kwargs):\n        \"\"\"Execute function with circuit breaker protection\"\"\"\n        if self.state == 'OPEN':\n            if time.time() - self.last_failure_time > self.timeout:\n                self.state = 'HALF_OPEN'\n            else:\n                raise CircuitBreakerOpenError(\"Circuit breaker is OPEN - too many recent failures\")\n        \n        try:\n            result = func(*args, **kwargs)\n            if self.state == 'HALF_OPEN':\n                self.state = 'CLOSED'\n                self.failures = 0\n            return result\n        except ZeroDivisionError:\n            self.failures += 1\n            self.last_failure_time = time.time()\n            if self.failures >= self.failure_threshold:\n                self.state = 'OPEN'\n            raise\n```\n\n---\n\n## Conclusions and Strategic Assessment\n\n### Key \n441\t**Impact**: Eliminates ~138 errors (28% of total) + prevents 403+ restarts  \n442\t**Implementation Time**: 2-4 hours\n443\t\n444\t**Solution**:\n445\t```python\n446\t# Add validation before volatility calculation\n447\tdef safe_implied_volatility(option_price, F, K, t, flag):\n448\t    # Validate parameters\n449\t    if not all([option_price > 0, F > 0, K > 0, t > 0]):\n450\t        logger.warning(\n451\t            f\"Invalid IV calculation parameters: \"\n452\t            f\"price={option_price}, F={F}, K={K}, t={t}\"\n453\t        )\n454\t        return None  # Or use default IV value\n455\t    \n456\t    try:\n457\t        return vectorized_implied_volatility(\n458\t            undiscounted_option_price, F, K, t, flag\n459\t        )\n460\t    except ZeroDivisionError as e:\n461\t        logger.error(f\"IV calculation failed: {e}\")\n462\t        return None\n463\t\n464\t# Update processing loop\n465\tfor option_data in options_stream:\n466\t    iv = safe_implied_volatility(...)\n467\t    if iv is None:\n468\t        continue  # Skip invalid records\n469\t```\n470\t\n471\t**Testing Strategy**:\n472\t1. Test with historical data that triggered errors\n473\t2. Verify logging captures invalid parameters\n474\t3. Confirm no pods restart with invalid data\n475\t4. Monitor error counts for 24 hours post-deployment\n476\t\n477\t---\n478\t\n479\t#### 🟡 HIGH: Improve Cloudflare API Error Handling\n480\t\n481\t**Priority**: HIGH  \n482\t**Impact**: Eliminates 363 errors (72% of total)  \n483\t**Implementation Time**: 4-6 hours\n484\t\n485\t**Solution**:\n486\t```python\n487\tdef verify_deployment_with_backoff(deployment_id, max_retries=3):\n488\t    \"\"\"\n489\t    Verify Cloudflare deployment with exponential backoff and early exit.\n490\t    \"\"\"\n491\t    for attempt in range(max_retries):\n492\t        try:\n493\t            # Check deployment exists first\n494\t            deployment = get_deployment(deployment_id)\n495\t            if not deployment:\n496\t                logger.warning(\n497\t                    f\"Deployment {deployment_id} not found, \"\n498\t                    f\"skipping verification\"\n499\t                )\n500\t                return False\n501\t            \n502\t            # Verify deployment status\n503\t            if deployment['status'] == 'success':\n504\t                return True\n505\t            elif deployment['status'] in ('failed', 'error'):\n506\t                logger.error(f\"Deployment {deployment_id} failed\")\n507\t                return False\n508\t            else:\n509\t                # Still in progress, wait with backoff\n510\t                time.sleep(2 ** attempt)  # Exponential backoff\n511\t                \n512\t        except HTTPError as e:\n513\t            if e.response.status_code == 404:\n514\t                logger.warning(f\"Deployment {deployment_id} not found\")\n515\t                return False  # Exit early on 404\n516\t            elif attempt < max_retries - 1:\n517\t                time.sleep(2 ** attempt)\n518\t            else:\n519\t                raise\n520\t    \n521\t    return False\n522\t\n523\t# Update deployment verification workflow\n524\tdeployment_success = verify_deployment_with_backoff(\n525\t    deployment_id, \n526\t    max_retries=3\n527\t)\n528\t```\n529\t\n530\t**Benefits**:\n531\t- Eliminates retry loops on deleted deployments\n532\t- Reduces API calls from 12 to 3 per failed deployment\n533\t- Improves deployment pipeline reliability\n534\t- Better error logging for debugging\n535\t\n536\t---\n537\t\n538\t#### 🟢 MEDIUM: Clean Up Failed IBKR MCP Pods\n539\t\n540\t**Priority**: MEDIUM  \n541\t**Impact**: Operational hygiene + resource cleanup  \n542\t**Implementation Time**: 15 minutes\n543\t\n544\t**Solution**:\n545\t```bash\n546\t# Remove historical failed pods\n547\tkubectl delete pod ibkr-mcp-server-7d78d47dbb-898mv -n ibkr-mcp\n548\tkubectl delete pod ibkr-mcp-server-7dd7c9c9bc-6cn57 -n ibkr-mcp\n549\t\n550\t# Verify cleanup\n551\tkubectl get pods -n ibkr-mcp\n552\t```\n553\t\n554\t**Benefits**:\n555\t- Cleans up cluster state\n556\t- Reduces monitoring noise\n557\t- Improves operational clarity\n558\t- Frees cluster resources\n559\t\n560\t---\n561\t\n562\t### Medium-Term Improvements\n563\t\n564\t#### 4. Implement Input Validation Framework\n565\t\n566\t**Priority**: MEDIUM  \n567\t**Impact**: Prevents future calculation errors  \n568\t**Implementation Time**: 1-2 days\n569\t\n570\t**Solution Architecture**:\n571\t```python\n572\tfrom pydantic import BaseModel, validator, Field\n573\t\n574\tclass OptionData(BaseModel):\n575\t    \"\"\"Schema for options data with validation.\"\"\"\n576\t    underlying_price: float = Field(gt=0)\n577\t    strike_price: float = Field(gt=0)\n578\t    time_to_expiration: float = Field(gt=0)\n579\t    option_price: float = Field(gt=0)\n580\t    \n581\t    @validator('time_to_expiration')\n582\t    def validate_tte(cls, v):\n583\t        if v <= 0:\n584\t            raise ValueError('Time to expiration must be positive')\n585\t        if v > 365*5:  # 5 years max\n586\t            raise ValueError('Time to expiration too large')\n587\t        return v\n588\t    \n589\t    @validator('option_price')\n590\t    def validate_price(cls, v):\n591\t        if v <= 0:\n592\t            raise ValueError('Option price must be positive')\n593\t        return v\n594\t\n595\t# Use in processing pipeline\n596\tfor raw_data in options_stream:\n597\t    try:\n598\t        validated_data = OptionData(**raw_data)\n599\t        iv = calculate_implied_volatility(validated_data)\n600\t    except ValidationError as e:\n601\t        logger.warning(f\"Invalid options data: {e}\")\n602\t        continue\n603\t```\n604\t\n605\t**Benefits**:\n606\t- Catches invalid data before calculations\n607\t- Provides clear validation error messages\n608\t- Standardizes data quality checks\n609\t- Enables data quality metrics\n610\t\n611\t---\n612\t\n613\t#### 5. Enhance Observability and Monitoring\n614\t\n615\t**Priority**: MEDIUM  \n616\t**Impact**: Better error tracking and alerting  \n617\t**Implementation Time**: 2-3 days\n618\t\n619\t**Solution Components**:\n620\t\n621\t**A. Structured Logging**:\n622\t```python\n623\timport structlog\n624\t\n625\tlogger = structlog.get_logger()\n626\tlogger.error(\n627\t    \"volatility_calculation_failed\",\n628\t    option_price=option_price,\n629\t    strike_price=K,\n630\t    forward_price=F,\n631\t    time_to_expiration=t,\n632\t    error=str(e)\n633\t)\n634\t```\n635\t\n636\t**B. Prometheus Metrics**:\n637\t```python\n638\tfrom prometheus_client import Counter, Histogram\n639\t\n640\tvolatility_errors = Counter(\n641\t    'volatility_calculation_errors_total',\n642\t    'Total volatility calculation errors',\n643\t    ['error_type']\n644\t)\n645\t\n646\tcalculation_duration = Histogram(\n647\t    'volatility_calculation_duration_seconds',\n648\t    'Volatility calculation duration'\n649\t)\n650\t```\n651\t\n652\t**C. Dashboards and Alerts**:\n653\t```yaml\n654\t# Prometheus alert rules\n655\tgroups:\n656\t- name: options_pipeline\n657\t  rules:\n658\t  - alert: HighVolatilityCalculationErrors\n659\t    expr: rate(volatility_calculation_errors_total[5m]) > 0.1\n660\t    annotations:\n661\t      summary: \"High volatility calculation error rate\"\n662\t      \n663\t  - alert: HighPodRestartRate  \n664\t    expr: rate(kube_pod_status_phase{phase=\"Failed\"}[5m]) > 0.05\n665\t    annotations:\n666\t      summary: \"High pod restart rate detected\"\n667\t```\n668\t\n669\t**Benefits**:\n670\t- Real-time error tracking\n671\t- Proactive alerting before failures\n672\t- Better debugging capabilities\n673\t- Trend analysis and capacity planning\n674\t\n675\t---\n676\t\n677\t#### 6. Implement Circuit Breaker Pattern\n678\t\n679\t**Priority**: MEDIUM  \n680\t**Impact**: Prevents cascade failures from external dependencies  \n681\t**Implementation Time**: 1-2 days\n682\t\n683\t**Solution**:\n684\t```python\n685\tfrom circuitbreaker import circuit\n686\t\n687\t@circuit(failure_threshold=5, recovery_timeout=60)\n688\tdef verify_cloudflare_deployment(deployment_id):\n689\t    \"\"\"Cloudflare deployment verification with circuit breaker.\"\"\"\n690\t    response = cloudflare_api.get(f\"deployments/{deployment_id}\")\n691\t    if response.status_code == 404:\n692\t        raise DeploymentNotFoundError(f\"Deployment {deployment_id} not found\")\n693\t    return response.json()\n694\t\n695\t# Usage with fallback\n696\ttry:\n697\t    result = verify_cloudflare_deployment(deployment_id)\n698\texcept CircuitBreakerOpen:\n699\t    logger.error(\"Circuit breaker open - Cloudflare API unavailable\")\n700\t    # Fallback logic or skip deployment verification\n701\texcept DeploymentNotFoundError:\n702\t    logger.warning(\"Deployment not found\")\n703\t    # Handle expected error\n704\t```\n705\t\n706\t**Benefits**:\n707\t- Prevents cascade failures from external API issues\n708\t- Automatic recovery when service returns\n709\t- Protects against rate limiting\n710\t- Improves system resilience\n711\t\n712\t---\n713\t\n714\t### Long-Term Architecture Improvements\n715\t\n716\t#### 7. Dead Letter Queue Pattern\n717\t\n718\t**Priority**: LOW  \n719\t**Impact**: Better error handling and data recovery  \n720\t**Implementation Time**: 3-5 days\n721\t\n722\t**Architecture**:\n723\t```\n724\tOptions Stream → Validation → Processing → Success\n725\t                    ↓ (failures)\n726\t                 Dead Letter Queue → Manual Review → Reprocess\n727\t```\n728\t\n729\t**Implementation**:\n730\t```python\n731\timport asyncio\n732\tfrom aiokafka import AIOKafkaProducer\n733\t\n734\tclass OptionsProcessor:\n735\t    def __init__(self):\n736\t        self.dlq_producer = AIOKafkaProducer(\n737\t            bootstrap_servers='kafka:9092'\n738\t        )\n739\t        self.main_topic = 'options-processing'\n740\t        self.dlq_topic = 'options-processing-dlq'\n741\t    \n742\t    async def process_option(self, option_data):\n743\t        try:\n744\t            validated = OptionData(**option_data)\n745\t            iv = calculate_implied_volatility(validated)\n746\t            await self.send_to_main(iv)\n747\t        except Exception as e:\n748\t            logger.error(f\"Processing failed: {e}\")\n749\t            await self.send_to_dlq({\n750\t                'data': option_data,\n751\t                'error': str(e),\n752\t                'timestamp': datetime.now().isoformat()\n753\t            })\n754\t```\n755\t\n756\t**Benefits**:\n757\t- Failed records preserved for analysis\n758\t- Manual review and correction workflow\n759\t- Reprocessing capability after fixes\n760\t- Better data quality tracking\n761\t\n762\t---\n763\t\n764\t#### 8. Deployment deleted or invalid ID provided\n2. Verification loop starts with 10-second retry intervals\n3. Each retry generates 404 error (deployment doesn't exist)\n4. No maximum retry limit or deployment existence check\n5. Continues until 120-second timeout (12 retries per deployment)\n\n**Impact Analysis**:\n- **API Efficiency**: 363 errors = ~30 failed deployments × 12 retries\n- **Cost**: Wasted API calls + processing time\n- **Monitoring**: Error logs flooded with expected failure messages\n\n---\n\n### Pattern 3: Exception Handling Leading to Restart Loops\n\n**System**: Options Pipeline  \n**Error Type**: Pod lifecycle issues  \n**Component**: Kubernetes deployment configuration\n\n**Current Behavior**:\n```yaml\n# Inferred deployment configuration\nspec:\n  restartPolicy: Always  # Default for deployments\n  containers:\n  - name: options-greeks\n    # No error handling → exceptions propagate to main process\n```\n\n**Failure Mode**:\n1. Application error occurs (ZeroDivisionError)\n2. Exception propagates to main process (unhandled)\n3. Process exits with error code\n4. Kubernetes detects container failure\n5. Pod restarts per `restartPolicy: Always`\n6. Next invalid record triggers same error\n\n**Impact Analysis**:\n- **Service Stability**: 403 restarts over 26 days = ~15.5 per day\n- **Resource Usage**: Each restart consumes CPU/memory for startup\n- **Monitoring**: High restart counts mask real issues\n- **Data Processing**: Restart windows create processing gaps\n\n---\n\n## Correlation Analysis: Do MCP Failures Trigger Pipeline pipeline errors.** The systems fail for completely different reasons with no temporal overlap or dependency relationships.\n\n---\n\n## Recommendations for Improving Resilience\n\n### Immediate Actions (High Priority)\n\n#### 🔴 CRITICAL: Fix ZeroDivisionError in Options-Greeks\n\n**Priority**: CRITICAL  \n**Impact**: Eliminates ~138 errors (28% of total) + prevents 403+ restarts  \n**Implementation Time**: 2-4 hours\n\n**Solution**:\n```python\n# Add validation before volatility calculation\ndef safe_implied_volatility(option_price, F, K, t, flag):\n    # Validate parameters\n    if not all([option_price > 0, F > 0, K > 0, t > 0]):\n        logger.warning(\n            f\"Invalid IV calculation parameters: \"\n            f\"price={option_price}, F={F}, K={K}, t={t}\"\n        )\n        return None  # Or use default IV value\n    \n    try:\n        return vectorized_implied_volatility(\n            undiscounted_option_price, F, K, t, flag\n        )\n    except ZeroDivisionError as e:\n        logger.error(f\"IV calculation failed: {e}\")\n        return None\n\n# Update processing loop\nfor option_data in options_stream:\n    iv = safe_implied_volatility(...)\n    if iv is None:\n        continue  # Skip invalid records\n```\n\n**Testing Strategy**:\n1. Test with historical data that triggered errors\n2. Verify logging captures invalid parameters\n3. Confirm no pods restart with invalid data\n4. Monitor error counts for 24 hours post-deployment\n\n---\n\n#### 🟡 HIGH: Improve Cloudflare API Error Handling\n\n**Priority**: HIGH  \n**Impact**: Eliminates 363 errors (72% of total)  \n**Implementation Time**: 4-6 hours\n\n**Solution**:\n```python\ndef verify_deployment_with_backoff(deployment_id, max_retries=3):\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify Cloudflare deployment with exponential backoff and early exit.\n    \"\"\"\n    for attempt in range(max_retries):\n        try:\n            # Check deployment exists first\n            deployment = get_deployment(deployment_id)\n            if not deployment:\n                logger.warning(\n                    f\"Deployment {deployment_id} not found, \"\n                    f\"skipping verification\"\n                )\n                return False\n            \n            # Verify deployment status\n            if deployment['status'] == 'success':\n                return True\n            elif deployment['status'] in ('failed', 'error'):\n                logger.error(f\"Deployment {deployment_id} failed\")\n                return False\n            else:\n                # Still in progress, wait with backoff\n                time.sleep(2 ** attempt)  # Exponential backoff\n                \n        except HTTPError as e:\n            if e.response.status_code == 404:\n                logger.warning(f\"Deployment {deployment_id} not found\")\n                return False  # Exit early on 404\n            elif attempt < max_retries - 1:\n                time.sleep(2 ** attempt)\n            else:\n                raise\n    \n    return False\n\n# Update deployment verification workflow\ndeployment_success = verify_deployment_with_backoff(\n    deployment_id, \n    max_retries=3\n)\n```\n\n**Benefits**:\n- Eliminates retry loops on deleted deployments\n- Reduces API calls from 12 to 3 per failed deployment\n- Improves deployment pipeline reliability\n- Better error logging for debugging\n\n---\n\n#### 🟢 MEDIUM: Clean Up Failed IBKR MCP Pods\n\n**Priority**: MEDIUM  \n**Impact**: Operational hygiene + resource cleanup  \n**Implementation Time**: 15 minutes\n\n**Solution**:\n```bash\n# Remove historical failed pods\nkubectl delete pod ibkr-mcp-server-7d78d47dbb-898mv -n ibkr-mcp\nkubectl delete pod ibkr-mcp-server-7dd7c9c9bc-6cn57 -n ibkr-mcp\n\n# Verify cleanup\nkubectl get pods -n ibkr-mcp\n```\n\n**Benefits**:\n- Cleans up cluster state\n- Reduces monitoring noise\n- Improves operational clarity\n- Frees cluster resources\n\n---\n\n### Medium-Term Improvements\n\n#### 4. Implement Input Validation Framework\n\n**Priority**: MEDIUM  \n**Impact**: Prevents future calculation errors  \n**Implementation Time**: 1-2 days\n\n**Solution Architecture**:\n```python\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, validator, Field\n\nclass OptionData(BaseModel):\n    \"\"\"Schema for options data with validation.\"\"\"\n    underlying_price: float = Field(gt=0)\n    strike_price: float = Field(gt=0)\n    time_to_expiration: float = Field(gt=0)\n    option_price: float = Field(gt=0)\n    \n    @validator('time_to_expiration')\n    def validate_tte(cls, v):\n        if v <= 0:\n            raise ValueError('Time to expiration must be positive')\n        if v > 365*5:  # 5 years max\n            raise ValueError('Time to expiration too large')\n        return v\n    \n    @validator('option_price')\n    def validate_price(cls, v):\n        if v <= 0:\n            raise ValueError('Option price must be positive')\n        return v\n\n# Use in processing pipeline\nfor raw_data in options_stream:\n    try:\n        validated_data = OptionData(**raw_data)\n        iv = calculate_implied_volatility(validated_data)\n    except ValidationError as e:\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid options data: {e}\")\n        continue\n```\n\n**Benefits**:\n- Catches invalid data before calculations\n- Provides clear validation error messages\n- Standardizes data quality checks\n- Enables data quality metrics\n\n---\n\n#### 5. Enhance Observability and Monitoring\n\n**Priority**: MEDIUM  \n**Impact**: Better error tracking and alerting  \n**Implementation Time**: 2-3 days\n\n**Solution Components**:\n\n**A. Structured Logging**:\n```python\nimport structlog\n\nlogger = structlog.get_logger()\nlogger.error(\n    \"volatility_calculation_failed\",\n    option_price=option_price,\n    strike_price=K,\n    forward_price=F,\n    time_to_expiration=t,\n    error=str(e)\n)\n```\n\n**B. Prometheus Metrics**:\n```python\nfrom prometheus_client import Counter, Histogram\n\nvolatility_errors = Counter(\n    'volatility_calculation_errors_total',\n    'Total volatility calculation errors',\n    ['error_type']\n)\n\ncalculation_duration = Histogram(\n    'volatility_calculation_duration_seconds',\n    'Volatility calculation duration'\n)\n```\n\n**C. Implement Circuit Breaker Pattern\n\n**Priority**: MEDIUM  \n**Impact**: Prevents cascade failures from external dependencies  \n**Implementation Time**: 1-2 days\n\n**Solution**:\n```python\nfrom circuitbreaker import circuit\n\n@circuit(failure_threshold=5, recovery_timeout=60)\ndef verify_cloudflare_deployment(deployment_id):\n    \"\"\"Cloudflare deployment verification with circuit breaker.\"\"\"\n    response = cloudflare_api.get(f\"deployments/{deployment_id}\")\n    if response.status_code == 404:\n        raise DeploymentNotFoundError(f\"Deployment {deployment_id} not found\")\n    return response.json()\n\n# Usage with fallback\ntry:\n    result = verify_cloudflare_deployment(deployment_id)\nexcept CircuitBreakerOpen:\n    logger.error(\"Circuit breaker open - Cloudflare API unavailable\")\n    # Fallback logic or skip deployment verification\nexcept DeploymentNotFoundError:\n    logger.warning(\"Deployment not found\")\n    # Handle expected error\n```\n\n**Benefits**:\n- Prevents cascade failures from external API issues\n- Automatic recovery when service returns\n- Protects against rate limiting\n- Improves system resilience\n\n---\n\n### Long-Term Architecture Improvements\n\n#### 7. Dead Letter Queue Pattern\n\n**Priority**: LOW  \n**Impact**: Better error handling and data recovery  \n**Implementation Time**: 3-5 days\n\n**Architecture**:\n```\nOptions Stream → Validation → Processing → Success\n                    ↓ (failures)\n                 Dead Letter Queue → Manual Review → Reprocess\n```\n\n**Implementation**:\n```python\nimport asyncio\nfrom aiokafka import AIOKafkaProducer\n\nclass OptionsProcessor:\n    def __init__(self):\n        self.dlq_producer = AIOKafkaProducer(\n            bootstrap_servers='kafka:9092'\n        )\n        self.main_topic = 'options-processing'\n        self.dlq_topic = 'options-processing-dlq'\n    \n    async def process_option(self, option_data):\n        try:\n            validated = OptionData(**option_data)\n            iv = calculate_implied_volatility(validated)\n            await self.send_to_main(iv)\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Processing failed: {e}\")\n            await self.send_to_dlq({\n                'data': option_data,\n                'error': str(e),\n                'timestamp': datetime.now().isoformat()\n            })\n```\n\n**Benefits**:\n- Failed records preserved for analysis\n- Manual review and correction workflow\n- Reprocessing capability after fixes\n- Better data quality tracking\n\n---\n\n#### 8. Resource Management and Monitoring\n\n**Priority**: LOW  \n**Impact**: Prevents infrastructure failures  \n**Implementation Time**: 2-3 days\n\n**Solution**:\n```yaml\n# Add to pod specifications\nspec:\n  containers:\n  - name: logs\n      mountPath: /var/log\n  volumes:\n  - name: logs\n    emptyDir:\n      sizeLimit: \"1Gi\"\n```\n\n**Add Kubernetes Monitoring**:\n```yaml\n# Prometheus alert rules\n- alert: EphemeralStorageHigh\n  expr: kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes / kubelet_volume_stats_capacity_bytes > 0.8\n  annotations:\n    summary: \"Ephemeral storage usage above 80%\"\n```\n\n**Benefits**:\n- Prevents pod evictions from resource exhaustion\n- Predictable resource allocation\n- Better cluster capacity planning\n- Proactive alerting before resource issues\n\n---\n\n## Conclusion and Next Steps\n\n### Assessment Summary:\n\n#### Options Pipeline: 🔴 **CRITICAL ATTENTION REQUIRED**\n- **Problem**: Application-level instability with 501+ errors over 30 days\n- **Root Causes**: Missing input validation, poor error handling, external API integration issues\n- **Business Impact**: High - application errors) 🔴\n\n**System:** Options Pipeline  \n**Impact:** 249+ pod restarts, data quality compromise  \n**Frequency:** ~29 failures per day  \n**Trend:** ⚠️ **DETERIORATING** (+81% since previous analysis)\n\n**Root Cause:** Missing input validation in volatility calculation\n\n**Recommended Fix:**\n```python\ndef safe_implied_volatility_calculation(undiscounted_option_price, F, K, t, flag):\n    \"\"\"Safe wrapper with input validation\"\"\"\n    # Input validation guards\n    if t <= 0:\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid time parameter: t={t}, skipping calculation\")\n        return None\n        \n    if F <= 0 or K <= 0:\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid price parameters: F={F}, K={K}, skipping calculation\")\n        return None\n    \n    if undiscounted_option_price <= 0:\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid undiscounted price: {undiscounted_option_price}\")\n        return None\n    \n    try:\n        return vectorized_implied_volatility(\n            undiscounted_option_price, F, K, t, flag\n        )\n    except ZeroDivisionError as e:\n        logger.error(f\"Calculation failed: price={undiscounted_option_price}, F={F}, K={K}, t={t}\")\n        return None\n    except Exception as e:\n        logger.error(f\"Unexpected calculation error: {e}\")\n        return None\n```\n\n---\n\n### 2. **Pod Instability Loop** (404 total restarts) improves data quality\n\n**Architecture:**\n```python\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, validator\n\nclass OptionData(BaseModel):\n    \"\"\"Schema with comprehensive validation\"\"\"\n    underlying_price: float\n    strike_price: float  \n    time_to_expiration: float\n    option_price: float\n    \n    @validator('time_to_expiration')\n    def validate_tte(cls, v):\n        if v <= 0:\n            raise ValueError('Time to expiration must be positive')\n        if v > 365*5:  # 5 years max\n            raise ValueError('Time to expiration too large')\n        return v\n    \n    @validator('strike_price', 'underlying_price', 'option_price')\n    def validate_prices(cls, v):\n        if v <= 0:\n            raise ValueError('Price must be positive')\n        return v\n```\n\n---\n\n#### 4. **Add Monitoring and Alerting**\n\n**Priority:** 🟡 **HIGH**  \n**Impact:** Proactive error detection, better operational visibility\n\n**Metrics:**\n```python\nfrom
